name: soft-decoration-boq-generator
description: 可在浏览器本地保存的软装 BOQ 清单管理工具

scripts.check:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
for file in ['index.html', 'src/styles.css', 'src/app.js']:
    text = Path(file).read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    assert text.strip(), f'{file} is empty'
print('static application files are present and readable')
PY
node --check src/app.js
